fallback_model: Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct (UD-Q4_K_XL GGUF, local Ollama on Apple Silicon)
provider_primary: Cerebras Cloud (https://api.cerebras.ai/v1) — free public endpoint, no paid plan
provider_fallback: Ollama (local, on contributor's M5 Max MacBook)
notes: Hybrid configuration. Cerebras Cloud's free tier (no card required) hosts Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct at ~2000 tok/s; it is the primary. When Cerebras 429s on the per-minute token quota, agent/src/models/router.ts marks it 'cold' for 60s and routes through the local Ollama fallback running Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct (unsloth UD-Q4_K_XL). All routing decisions and provider switches are timestamped in agent_logs/human_interventions.log. Earlier during exploration we briefly also tested NVIDIA NIM and Featherless free tiers; both were removed before the final scoring run. No paid API access. Architectural inspiration drawn from the publicly leaked Claude Code source (March 2026); no Claude Code files ship in this repo.
